    decodeByteToInt(byte[]) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.config.AppConfigAPI
    Decodes a byte array into an integer.
    decodeByteToString(byte[]) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.config.AppConfigAPI
    Decodes a byte array into a string.
    Default(String) - Constructor for record class org.novastack.iposca.utils.db.ColumnConstraint.Default
    Creates an instance of a Default record class.
    DEFAULT_CATALOG - Static variable in class schema.DefaultCatalog
    The reference instance of DEFAULT_CATALOG
    DEFAULT_SCHEMA - Variable in class schema.DefaultCatalog
    The schema DEFAULT_SCHEMA.
    DEFAULT_SCHEMA - Static variable in class schema.DefaultSchema
    The reference instance of DEFAULT_SCHEMA
    DefaultCatalog - Class in schema
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    DefaultSchema - Class in schema
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    deleteCustomer(int) - Method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.Customer
    Deletes an existing customer from the database given their ID.
    deleteDebt(int) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerDebt
    Deletes the debt entry of a given customer and is triggered by CustomerPayment when a customer's account status is in normal or suspended, and they make a repayment, and DebtController when a dry-deleted debt of an in-default customer has their account restored to normal.
    deleteItem(int) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.stock.Stock
    Deletes a non-IPOS product from the database.
    deleteMonthData(int, YearMonth) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.statement.StatementService
    When a debt gets absolved before the end of the month, there is no need for a statement, so delete the debt tracking data.
    deleteUserById(int) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.user.User
    Deletes a user from the database based on their ID.

    dryDeleteDebt(int) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerDebt
    Nullifies/erases data on a debt but does not erase it from the database.
